title: Programmer Art Dark Mode
description: this texture pack changes the game menu to a dark one while keeping the blue color of the old pre-1.15 menus (made for version 1.21-1.21.11)
body: This texture pack doesn't need Optifine. I recommend using it with Programmer Art Textures to keep a classic but modern look in these newer versions. It can be useful if you like the look of the old menu but not the brightness it can have, especially when playing at night (minecraft sometimes tags texture packs as incompatible but it works on every 1.21x versions)
